title: polygala sparsiflora var. sparsiflora
intro: Polygala sparsiflora var. sparsiflora, also known as the Poor Man's Fortnight Lily, is a flowering plant species belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, bronchitis, and coughs, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
